workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.4 mph · 6-8% incline (skip if session hits 65 min)

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: Clean 3×10 at 355 last Friday. Controlled tempo, don't lock knees at top.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: Hit 160 cleanly last Friday. Full hip extension, squeeze at top, no hyperextension.

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.note: Hit 45×12×3 last week. Hinge from hips, soft knee bend, back stays flat.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: 88 was too much last Friday — got 10/9 then dropped. Back to 77, push for 12 each set.

exercises.name: KB Swing (Two-Hand)
exercises.note: 30 felt light in early May — time to try 35. Drive with hips, not arms.

exercises.name: Core Circuit C
exercises.detail: Cable Crunch 50 lb × 12 + Hanging Knee Raise × 10-12 + Side Plank 25s/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Haven't hit this combo recently. Kneeling cable crunch — round into it. Full hang on knee raise.

week.note: Done — incline bench 10/10/8, shoulder press 3×10 (12 on set 3), T-bar row 3×10 (12 on set 3)
Leg press 360 · hip thrust 165 · RDL 50 · leg curl 77×12 · KB swing 35 · core circuit C
